name: Pong Hau K'i
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Pong Hau K'i, a traditional Chinese/Korean blocking game on a 5-point board (a square of four corners plus a centre, with one side of the square left unconnected). Each player has two stones; you slide a stone along an edge into the single empty point. A player with no legal move loses. A known frequent draw under perfect play.
